title: DINARIC ALPS | Sjenica lamb PDO – Pester plateau
description: A policy brief examining the protected designation of origin (PDO) Sjenica lamb value chain on the Pester plateau in the Dinaric Alps and its role in regional development and mountain resilience. It identifies natural and socio-economic challenges, evaluates current policies, and proposes recommendations for improving collective governance, sustainability, and market integration of this traditional livestock product.
